programme.desc: At the request of a television neighbor, Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it to travel. Prince Tuesday does not understand why he is not big like Neighbor Aber and King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown. Robert Troll is the only one who can communicate with the “big thing.” He learns that it wants a blanket; the blanket causes it to sprout a stem and leaves.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays games that require patience. Purple Panda experiments with a powder that causes flowers to grow. Prince Tuesday wishes the powder to make him grow. Mister Rogers goes to see the Harlem Spiritual Ensemble practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Harriett Cow shares the plans for a play. Lady Aberlin is greeted by a ballet dancer who dances her around the Neighborhood. The dancer inspires Ana Platypus to be a ballerina in the school play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains why he changes into a sweater and sneakers, and shows how people make sweaters and sneakers. Miss Paulificate brings Prince Tuesday's ragdoll to life by dancing with him. The neighbors decide their roles in a play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday suggests that the Neighborhood of Make-Believe be turned upside down to see if the missing crown might fall out. Trolley finds the spare crown! Mister Rogers visits the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Maggie Stewart is dressed as Mr. McFeely and delivers a film about how people make sweaters. The children put on a play about a princess, a raccoon and a giant king. Prince Tuesday admits he had something to do with the missing crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow paint a portrait of Mr. McFeely. Robert Troll paints a portrait of King Friday who asks Lady Aberlin to have everyone copy it for themselves. Lady Aberlin explains that art comes from within each person.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture of a blue tree. In art, you can make things any way you want. He also talks about visiting art museums.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers "colors a song" by playing music by Mozart to inspire his artwork. King Friday is curious about a delivery to X the Owl labelled "Deliver to X the Owl ONLY.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow approaching with his imaginary dog. Robert Troll and his imaginary pet, Gloria, are visiting with Queen Sara. When the Queen departs for a meeting, Gloria disappears into the castle.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett stops by for some sitting down exercises. Prince Tuesday asks Handyman Negri to help bring his ragdoll to life. Corney has made a new (imaginary) umbrella Rockit for Daniel's imaginary friend, Malcolm Apricot Dinko.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers delights in a visitor who can whistle, especially because that's something Mister Rogers hasn't been able to learn. Nobody can do everything!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: A domino display artist sets up thousands of dominoes. When one is knocked over, they all go down in a fascinating pattern. Lady Elaine's elevator in Make-Believe takes Robert Troll up in the air as if he's flying.

programme.desc: People in charming Hope Mills, North Carolina are on edge when a high school freshman vanishes while on her way to meet a friend. When she turns up dead three weeks later, the community rallies to flush out the killer.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: A brutal double murder shocks Northern California's peace-loving and laid back Marin County. With residents reeling, police chase an elusive killer through three counties and multiple crime scenes.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Women are most often assaulted by someone they know. Near Las Vegas in December of 2000 a young woman became the latest victim of a violent sex offender. Before authorities could locate him, he would add murder to his list of crimes.

programme.title: Speed Is the New Black

programme.title: Super Turbo Story Time

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold

programme.title: Roadkill's Junkyard Gold

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop

programme.title: Runs Good

programme.title: Engine Masters
programme.desc: A look at how oil kills power because it's not about synthetic versus regular oil and not about a brand-to-brand comparison, but about windage and oil-pan design.

programme.title: Engine Masters

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: The Dirt-Heads choose a big Dodge diesel mud truck on 65-inch tractor tires to fix it up before they go experience the mud life in Okeechobee, Fla.

programme.title: Dirt Every Day
programme.desc: Fred Williams' 1986 Toyota rock crawler, Clampy, has been sitting for about five years and it's time for an adventure; Fred and Dave Chappelle blow off the vehicle's cobwebs and head out from California to find every type of off-road terrain.

programme.title: Runs Good
programme.desc: What was supposed to be an unfinished project feels more like a mechanic special; with problem after problem, it looks like this car was closer to ending up in a landfill than laying down 11s leaving the car meet.

programme.title: Engine Masters

programme.desc: Timmy adopta un travieso perro hada.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea que el Sr. Dinkleberg tome el lugar de su padre como el líder de los Squirrely Scouts; Cosmo pierde la memoria y se cree un genio que pertenece al papá de Timmy.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy descubre que él tiene que compartir sus hadas con la chica nueva en la escuela, Chloe Carmichael, pero cuando Chloe se da cuenta de que ella puede usar su magia para el bien, ella desea que todos en Dimmsdale deben compartir y el caos viene.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Catman cree que Timmy ha sido secuestrado, él recurre a Chloe y a Catgirl para trabajar en el rescate; Timmy es acosado por los paparazzi.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Chloe se une a los Squirrely Scouts y salva la tropa, ayudando a obtener su primera medalla al mérito; cuando Tim y Chloe descubren que tienen la misma fecha de nacimiento, deciden competir por la mejor fiesta.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Chloe quiere un animal con un parecido a Mr. Crocker, para que no esté en peligro; Timmy, Chloe y las hadas se meten dentro de Mr. Crocker para exterminar un germen.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Tim y Chloe deben ir al rescate, cuando los padres de Chloe deciden regresar a Cosmo y Wanda, que se disfrazaron de aves en su hábitat natural.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Foop se disfraza de chica para evitar que Chloe destruya el mundo de las antihadas; Timmy lleva a Chloe a conocer a Mark Chang, con el propósito de que él le demuestre que los extraterrestres existen.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Después de que Timmy y Chloe salvan la mascota querida de Dark Laser, este se allega a ellos como su guardespaldas; Timmy y Chloe quieren que Mr. Crocker tenga una novia para quitárselo de encima.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe cambian de lugares, pero Cosmo pierde las varitas y corren el riesgo de quedar atrapados así para siempre.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker crea clones de Cosmo y Wanda para entrar a la convención de padrinos y robar toda la magia. Timmy desea que Chloe pueda vivir en su película distópica favorita, pero se arrepiente cuando ve que todos están hambrientos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe cumplen su objetivo, que sus familias acampen juntas, pero sus padres se pelean; Chloe desea ser mamá para poder asistir a un evento con Timmy.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe ayudan a Gatoman a demostrarle a su novia que es un superhéroe real; el Sr. Crocker le enseña a su sobrino, Kevin Crocker, a cazar de padrinos mágicos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Los Squirrley Scouts van al espacio para colocar una bandera en un terreno desconocido, con la esperanza de lograr un lugar especial de los Squirrely Scouts; Chloe pasa las vacaciones de verano estudiando, pero su niño interior no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: A pesar de las advertencias de Timmy, Chloe quiere liberar a la liebre de la clase; cuando el papá de Timmy compra la última Kale Patch Kid, Chloe quiere completar su colección robándola.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy y Chloe se transforman en sirenas y salvan la ciudad sumergida de la Atlántida de un peligrosísimo monstruo marino; Chloe se convierte en vigilante de pasillos en la escuela, pero surgen problemas porque se toma el cargo demasiado en serio.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: La Sra. Crocker deja al Sr. Crocker en casa solo por primera vez, y llama a Timmy para que le enseñe cómo divertirse; Chloe quiere romper el récord de asistencia, pero Timmy le dice que su escuela está suspendida y la lleva a un puesto de tacos.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Mamá y papá quieren renovar sus votos matrimoniales en un crucero de aventura con caballeros, pero terminan en un crucero de tejedores; el Sr. Bickles auspicia un concurso de talentos, y todos participan excepto Timmy.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: The soul of Cuba is found in a baseball stadium packed with exuberant fans.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony visits with food-obsessed individuals.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony joins the band The Black Keys for some serious BBQ in Kansas City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Eugene believes that Shannon cheated on him that he has even broken into her home to setup recording devices. Next, Deontae left Kapreece after she had her baby and denied fatherhood. Will the lie detector results mend or break these relationships?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nesi thinks Omar is cheating on her with another man from text messages on his phone. Plus, Karissa's life fell apart after she and her husband moved in with Josh! A few weeks later, their baby mysteriously died. What will the lie detectors say?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Last year, Maurice was caught cheating on Karen on The Maury Show and is back with his new fiancé Shauntia. Is he still cheating? Then, 17-year-old Destanee thinks the father of her baby is cheating...with her mother!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Talisa found a woman hiding in her boyfriend Andre's closet. Can he pass Maury's sexy decoy test? Then, Nikki's entire family is on the line because she has to prove that she has not cheated on her husband Daniel and that he fathered her kids.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki's boyfriend Tavon is cheating on her. What will they say when they watch him on our hidden cameras? Then, was Naomi's fiancé able to resist our sexy decoy? Plus, is Jeremiah's baby with Robin really his?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her 10 month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trisha suspects her boyfriend Ernie of drugging her for an even darker reason! Then, can Jessica finally get the help she needs on Steve's stage?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John is cheating on his wife Destinee with Cici, but Cici's got some secrets too. Then, Lala drops a bombshell on her man. Plus Michael and his wife Tayliana both have secrets to reveal to each other.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: The truth comes out on today's Jerry Springer Show! Michelle tells her lover David that she's really a man. Speedy fights to win his ex-girlfriend back from her new lover Tom.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: In this special episode, a group of select viewers will duke it out with some of Jerry’s outrageously memorable guests!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Je’nier has a wild secret to share with Preston. Then, it’s Nikki and Nikky going after one man! Will Nikki or Nikky win Kevin’s heart? Does Kevin deserve either woman's love?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dan is here today to beg Heather to give him another chance. Next Ginny wants Tim back and says that he still calls her. Later Shenidia is furious that another women is trying to steal her boyfriend of 4 years, Gary.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dra confesses to his girlfriend Chance that he had a one-night stand with his best friend's girlfriend. Jennifer admits to cheating on her fiancé with his best friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anitra learns who her partner Kevin really is! Next James is weeks away from marrying Liz, but he has two big secrets to reveal. Then Elliot says he made the mistake of his life when he cheated on his boyfriend, Rob!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Khloe is ready to reveal to Jamal that she may not be the woman he thinks she is. Nick is here to confront his wife Barbara and the man she’s been sleeping with, Jason. Plus, Danielle is ready to confront her friend Amy for spreading lies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Penny busted her super-sized husband, Chris, and her cousin, Christy, together. Next Rovin is here to confront her best friend for sleeping with Chucky, Robin's boyfriend. But Chucky shocks both women when he introduces them to his new lover, Arthur!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Fedora encuentra a Diego de pie agrediendo a Silvia y le pide una explicación por mentir que seguía inválido. Fiona y Maximiliano se vuelven a encontrar.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diego se presenta ante Maximiliano, quien se encuentra secuestrado y amarrado. Diego lo tortura violentamente y le asegura que va a pagar por todo. Marfil le pide a Yolanda que hable con Max para que renuncie a su puesto en la fábrica.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diego está a punto de dispararle a Maximiliano. Diana siente compasión por Marfil y se siente confundida. Fedora le prohíbe a Diana considerar el hecho de regresar junto a Maximiliano.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Leonora es atrapada merodeando en la oficina de Saladino y quiere saber por qué. Leonora inventa que tiene curiosidad por saber por qué quiere que Verónica se convierta en monja a cualquier precio.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Santiago consigue llevarse a Verónica con la ayuda de Willy, ignorando las amenazas de Saladino. Santiago le explica a Verónica como fueron los hechos realmente y que todo fue una trampa.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana le muestra a Gertrudis el certificado de matrimonio con Martin y ella le exige que viva con él. Luego, Luciano le presenta a Leonora, sin darse cuenta de que ella es su madre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: En vista de que Willy quiere el divorcio, aunque no sea para estar unido a Mariana. Margot se quedará sin dinero de todas maneras, proponiendo a Morgana que en vez de Esteban termine solo con Luciano.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Guillermo recorren las adyacencias de la hacienda Arismendi, esperando encontrar el paradero de Jimena y su hijo. Eva recurre a su hábil engaño para evitar un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario es testigo del arrepentimiento de Jimena, al recibir de su parte el deseo de ser perdonada por su errónea actitud y la información acerca de su paradero.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve enfrentada una ves mas con los enfermizo celos de Patricio quien al sospechar de su infidelidad la obliga a confesarle sus sentimientos y la amenza diciendole de nunca dejarla ser feliz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se encuentra con la abuela de Rosaura, teniendo así la oportunidad de explicarle a Doña Cruz los sentimientos que alberga por la mujer que ama.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diego está a punto de dispararle a Maximiliano. Diana siente compasión por Marfil y se siente confundida. Fedora le prohíbe a Diana considerar el hecho de regresar junto a Maximiliano.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diego chantajea a Diana y le dice que la llevará a donde se encuentra Maximiliano bajo una condición. Silvia choca con otra mujer en el carro y se escapa.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana le reclama a Diego por lo que la obligó a decir frente a Maximiliano, y le pide que ahora cumpla su parte del trato. Eduardo le regala a Fiona un anillo, pero ella le confiesa lo que realmente siente.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are no strangers to living on the wrong side of the law, but unpaid immigration fees and Nami’s assault of a White Beret earns Luffy’s crew a sentence of death by cloud drifting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Zoro, Chopper, and Robin are trapped aboard the Going Merry when it’s commandeered by a monstrous lobster! To rescue his crew, Luffy must venture onto the sacred grounds of Upper Yard!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Conis helps Luffy and his mates launch their rescue mission, but the rubber-man senses something amiss. When he presses her for answers, a vengeful god takes a shot at the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro dukes it out with a hungry Skyshark in the shadow of the Sacrificial Alter. On the other side of Upper Yard, Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp try to survive their visit to an island that wants them dead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp tangle with Satori and his exploding, snake-filled Surprise Clouds. The sky priest may look like a dancing dango, but the impact of his mantra leaves the pirates bloodied and boatless.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Sanji try to regain control of the Crow, and Luffy stirs up a brutal barrage of bursting balls when he attacks Satori. Meanwhile, Chopper whistles for the Sky Knight to avoid becoming a sacrificial reindeer!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper fights bravely to stop Shura from incinerating the Going Merry, but the little reindeer is no match for a sky priest. Gan Fall is on his way, but will the dispossessed deity arrive in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Gan Fall is badly burned during his battle with Shura, Chopper musters the courage for a death-defying leap of faith. Elsewhere, Luffy may have finally discovered a way to defeat Satori!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the heartless god of Upper Yard eagerly anticipates the dawning of Sky Warefare, the Shandorian forces are savagely snared by the Ordeal of String, and Luffy wanders into the fight of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro rushes to perfect a deadly technique known as the Flying Blade Attack. The move proves difficult to master, but it could be the key to the swordsman surviving a battle with the Shandorian warrior, Braham.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Usopp are driven to their knees by the electrifying presence of god, Luffy is nearly incinerated by Wyper’s Burn Bazooka, and Nami joins Gan Fall in a fight against two killer clones!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper unleashes the fury of his Rumble Ball during a sticky slugfest with a swap cloud spewing priest of Upper Yard. Can the little reindeer discover his opponent’s lone weakness before it’s too late?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the Knight of the Sky team up to obliterate two bumbling, balloon-shaped bad guys, and God Eneru relies on his astounding invincibility to torment a noble Shandorian warrior.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin’s search for a mystical city of gold is interrupted by Yama, one of Eneru’s faithful servants. When the rampaging warrior destroys some ancient ruins, he provokes the wrath of Robin’s many fists of fury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Priest Ohm silences Chopper with an attack from which few – if any – ever recover. Meanwhile, Luffy begins to notice something strange about his cave-like prison, and four fearsome warriors prepare for battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Gan Fall, Wyper, Ohm, and a prizefighting pooch gather for a ferocious free-for-all at the site of the Upper Ruins. While the battle rages, Luffy tries to punch his way out of the belly of a poisonous python!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Wyper are out to beat down the same bad guys, but will they realize it soon enough to survive a white-barbed death match of doom? Deep in the belly of the python, Nami and Luffy enjoy what could be a short-lived reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eager to end their battle, Zoro aims the awesome destructive power of his 108 Caliber Phoenix at the sinister Priest Ohm! Elsewhere, god demands that Robin help him search for a legendary golden bell.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru begins a deadly rampage aimed at exterminating the heavenly beings of Skypiea, and the ruins of Shandora become the scene of a bloody contest where survival is the name of the game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gan Fall, Wyper, Zoro, and Robin join forces for an attack on God Eneru. Despite their furious onslaught, the four warriors prove powerless to harm the thunderous deity until Wyper utilizes the power of a mystical stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru makes a shocking recovery from wounds that should have ended his reign of terror. Zoro and Wyper muster the strength for one final stand, and Nami must choose between her friends – and survival.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges from his serpentine tomb with one thing on his mind: revenge! As the rubber-man sets out to settle the score with God Eneru, Conis rushes to warn her people of their impending doom!

programme.desc: Malaysia is one of a handful of countries in the world described as mega-diverse. Malaysia's animals and plants have exploited every opportunity to carve out an existence and so have adapted to some very strange ways of life.

programme.title: Hedgehog Hotel
programme.desc: The Hedgehog Hotel offers a rare and magical glimpse into the mysterious moonlit world of one of our best-loved, but little-known animals.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson shows off the cutest baby sloth ever, some tiny monkeys with a sweet tooth and a baby otter.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: Two cubs become deathly ill from a parasite that has killed many bears. The shelter gets their 45 bears ready for hibernation.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote is in West Virginia and finally catches the elusive timber rattlesnake!

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes in Koala Creek as kidney disease claims the life of Wilpena and now keepers fear for Violet after worrying test results.

programme.title: Polar Bears
programme.desc: Following the lives of polar bears -- top predators able to withstand a harsh environment.

programme.title: Wild Bear Rescue
programme.desc: Tanja and Shawn embark on long and hot bear-release trip that turns into a rescue mission.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: It’s Halifax through the eyes of its wildest residents. During the day, squirrels and chipmunks compete for territory in the city park. At night, Halifax’s raccoons invade backyards and seagulls scour the streets for pizza.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and Mario explore the wilds of Ohio for snapping turtles and end up catching double dragons!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote spots a Burmese python that is much more aggressive than he bargained for!

programme.title: Wild Assassins
programme.desc: These creatures’ weapon of choice is their ability to chomp down hard on their prey - perfect in battle but also when on the hunt.

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: A small army of zoo experts were sent to a German zoo to count everything from pink flamingos to fish. Have you ever tried counting a wall-sized tank of fish, constantly moving about?

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: Every year animals migrate to the Canadian East. These incredible journeys bring humpback whales from the tropics to the Bay of Fundy to feed. They also bring Canada geese from the southern United States to Nova Scotia to breed.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote attempts to pickup and hold one of the spiniest creatures on the planet: the echidna!

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Wildlife filmmakers experience many emotionally touching moments on their expeditions while observing their main characters over a longer period of time.

programme.title: Little Killers
programme.desc: The world is full of predators, but not all are big and showy. Lurking in the shadows, the little killers can be just as effective.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: After five ruthless hijackers take control of an EgyptAir flight and begin executing passengers, a woman silently says goodbye to her loved ones.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Traveling through Southeast Alaska the team experiences glaciers up close while testing all of their new gear on the Stikine River. Expedition Leader Steven Moll suffers a catastrophic breakdown and the team may have to leave their leader behind.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The expedition gets caught in a small craft advisory just below Haines Alaska with members of the team getting thrown into the frigid waters. Patrick’s watercraft is replaced and the men find themselves sinking in the Gulf of Alaska.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains where Laramy is hunting. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy chases after the big game cat of North America, the mountain lion! Known for dropping out of trees on unsuspecting prey, will Laramy be able to find this lion, before the lion finds him?

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy honors the history of the mountain man by trapping for beaver in the lower Rockies.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy takes an old pal, who owns an 1874 Sharps 45-70 buffalo gun, to hunt in the way of the Mountain Man. Sizzling elk meat is on the menu tonight!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: From crabs and sculpins to pricklebacks and chitons... Wait, what is a chiton? Get ready to find out!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote spots a Burmese python that is much more aggressive than he bargained for!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: From a baby fox to an orphaned baby reindeer, watch as Coyote gets up close with these cute creatures!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew discover a frog with transparent skin! Watch as Coyote introduces us to the 'glass frog.'

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Great white and tiger sharks attack people in California and Hawaii.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A runner faces a bear, and a mountain lion attacks an oil pipeline worker.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Ashley shows what it's like to be a lady-gator wrestler.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Alligator rescues are halted as the Everglades Outpost closes.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul rallies the Gator Boys to rush to Mississippi for a gigantic gator.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Crocodiles are one of the most dangerous species on earth. Over 200 million years old, they survived even the dinosaurs with their rapacious ability to hunt and stalk prey. Yet one man believes he actually has the ability to tame a wild crocodile.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: One woman's secret life with deadly venomous snakes is exposed in shocking circumstances while another woman's obsession with venom leads to several near-fatal accidents. Can her family persuade her to give up her passion?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts, and Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia fight not only with them but also with each other. Down in Texas, Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froy's warrant and get in way over their heads working...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home. Back in LA, Frankie's wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking...

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo but, when the debtors attack with chainsaws, Ronnie and Carlos are left to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: Elite forces from opposite sides of the Cold War are simulated squad versus squad, calling upon their special training and armed with shotguns, sniper rifles and pistols.

programme.title: Alone

programme.desc: Three is the magic number as our bladesmiths are asked to forge three or more metals into a blade of their signature style. Despite pain and failure, two moves on to the final round returning home to forge a legendary spiked shield.

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.desc: Don uses Charlie and Megan's expertise when the FBI is called to the scene of a federal judge's wife's murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team search for the stalker of a pop princess which turns into a murder investigation of a paparazzo.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team must solve the murder of a CFO of a large energy corporation who is found murdered on her doorstep and her young son is the only witness

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates when the teenage son of a Secret Service agent disappears. They discover a long-festering secret that sets in motion a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team is forced to drop one case for another after a child is kidnapped from a shopping mall and Medina (recurring guest star STEVEN WEBER) shifts all resources to the new case.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a bank manager who goes missing after an argument with a mysterious man. And Jack is reinstated as head of the department.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing paraplegic and unearths a secret he had been keeping.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and Samantha travel to Los Angeles to follow the trail of a man who disappears after his employee's funeral. Plus, Jack and Samantha rekindle their relationship.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team tries to determine if a doctor's past is somehow connected to her disappearance after she vanishes from a hospital. DAVID GIUNTOLI ("Privileged") guest stars.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a local television weatherman who goes missing after he shows up to work bleeding from his side.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing teen who disappears after her mother picks her up from school. Jack and Samantha's relationship hits a speed bump. ADAM KAUFMAN guest stars.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing bar owner who possesses a religious statue which is believed to create miracles. THOMAS CALABRO ("Melrose Place") guest stars as Eddie Gilroy.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Elena's former partner who disappears after an undercover sting operation.

programme.title: Gang Related
programme.desc: Corrupt detectives Tupac Shakur and James Belushi, having framed an innocent man (Dennis Quaid) for the murder of an undercover DEA agent, find their lives unraveling when they come under the scrutiny of DEA investigator Richard Simms (Gary Cole).

programme.title: LUV
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy gets a crash course in what it means to be a man when he spends a day with the ex-convict uncle he idolizes.
When a student writes the police code for homicide, 187, inside a textbook owned by teacher Trevor Garfield, he feels threatened.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: C.H.U.D. (1984)
programme.desc: John Heard, Daniel Stern, and Kim Greist star in this wildly original horror shocker.

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: When Trish (Michele Michaels) decides to invite her high school girls' basketball teammates over for a slumber party, she has no idea the night is going to end with an unexpected guest.

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine (1981)
programme.desc: 20 years ago, a tragic accident on Valentine's Day took the lives of 5 miners when supervisors left their posts to attend a Valentine's Day dance. On the disaster's first anniversary, the only survivor returns to the town for bloody revenge

programme.title: Species
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker, and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Species II: Species II
programme.desc: A trio of American astronauts become instant heroes as they plant the Stars and Stripes on Mars before beginning the voyage home. But back on their ship, something else has set its sights on Earth, something whose relatives have already paid us a visit.

programme.title: Candy Corn
programme.desc: When a local outcast is murdered the night before Halloween, he's resurrected to seek revenge on those who wronged him.

programme.title: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Teetering on the edge of sanity, volatile literary agent Peter Loew (Nicolas Cage) tries to find purpose in his life through a cutthroat work ethic and a hedonistic nightlife.

programme.title: Bugsy
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: This Beautiful Fantastic
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of a beautiful London garden, this contemporary fairy tale centers on the unlikely friendship between a reclusive young woman who dreams of writing children’s books and a cranky widower.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: OSCAR-winning Meryl Streep is Margaret Thatcher in this insightful and intimate portrait of the first and only female Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Lions for Lambs
programme.desc: Lions For Lambs tells the poignant and layered story of several individuals caught up at various ends of the U.S. War on terror.

programme.title: Brian's Song
programme.desc: Based on the real-life relationship between teammates Brian Piccolo and Gale Sayers and the bond established when Piccolo discovers that he is dying.

programme.title: This Beautiful Fantastic
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of a beautiful London garden, this contemporary fairy tale centers on the unlikely friendship between a reclusive young woman who dreams of writing children’s books and a cranky widower.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell (2017)
programme.desc: Major (Scarlett Johansson) is the first of her kind: a human mind inside an artificial body. Discovering her creators lied about her past life to control her, Major will stop at nothing to unravel the mystery of her true identity and exact revenge.

programme.title: The Time Machine
programme.desc: Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th-century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds humankind divided into two warring races.

programme.title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow
programme.desc: When mysterious giant robots begin attacking the streets of New York City, intrepid reporter Polly Perkins is on the story and enlists the aid of ace aviator and old flame Joseph 'Sky Captain' Sullivan.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Jarrod and Elaine travel to Los Angeles to meet his friend Terry and his wife Candice. Terry gives a party in his apartment for Jarrod. The next morning, the group is awakened by beams of light. The group of friends try to escape from the alien invaders.

programme.title: The Time Machine

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Gold
programme.desc: Wherever the Japanese conquered, they looted. Some say the treasure was the greatest-ever collected in history, consisting of gem-stones, platinum, and gold. At today's values, they estimate the treasure to have been worth over US $100 billion.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Gold

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: For four years during WWI, a life was lost every 25 seconds. After the carnage, a new age of prosperity and celebration was expected. However, it would not be so simple. The economy and society had a lot of recovering to do.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In effort to keep peace, treaties were proposed to keep the aggressors of World War 1 under-armed. The ratio of military power was drastically in favor of the US and Great Britain. This might have successfully kept peace, if it was only given a chance.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: Exchange rates and floundering economies were not the only things influencing how and where people lived. The motor-car and other technological advances were transformative, though some clung tight to the past...

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: As Paris lurched into 1929, it seemed on the surface (to those with deep pockets) that the party would go on forever. However, few saw the impending future claiming that these people were just hiding away from a harsh reality.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In the 20s there seemed to be some good candidates for leadership in Europe. But where were these people when the great depression hits, affecting the lives of people around the world?

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: As the effect of the depression in the US became clear, Japanese businessmen began to think that America would never recover. They then set their focus on East Asia, where the invasion of Manchuria had doubled the size of the Japanese empire.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: No one knows for sure if early action would have stopped Adolph Hitler's ambition. But we do know that inaction certainly didn't. Buy why did neighboring countries refuse to act early? One word: Appeasement.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: Some saw the idea of appeasement as the salvation of peace. Some were so blinded by it, that they either didn't see or ignored, Hitler's all too obvious strategic manipulation of territories.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A young and lonely teen (guest star Danielle Harris) attempts to get friendly with the sisters after being possessed by Kali (guest star Rebecca Carlton), a demon bent on gaining the girls’ powers from them.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After a warlock from the future comes to the present to destroy the people who will eventually create a vaccine against warlocks, Prue casts a 24-hour truth spell in order to determine if Andy finds out she’s a witch, will he still be attracted to her.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Rex (Neil Roberts) gets Prue (Shannen Doherty) a locket that harbors the evil warlock Matthew (guest star Matthew Tate), Matthew takes Prue’s powers and sets out for the other sisters.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Rex (guest star Neil Roberts) and Hannah (guest star Leigh- Allyn Baker) set out to destroy the sisters Halliwell and frame Prue (Shannen Doherty) for murder while angering her by Rex dating Phoebe (Alyssa Milano).

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe’s old flame Clay comes to town after he and his partners steal a valuable urn that is guarded by a demon, putting Prue in jeopardy after Clay gets Phoebe to ask Prue to help sell the urn.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is almost killed by a beast, she notices a strange transformation she begins to make – all similar traits to her attacker. Meanwhile, Phoebe works as Prue’s assistant and tries to help a family reunite after a premonition.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: On the eve of another Friday the 13th, the sisters learn of a demon (guest star Billy Drago) who kills witches after discovering their deepest fears. Now, he’s after Prue (Shannen Doherty) since discovering her fear of water.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help a young boy (guest star David Netter), who’s received his mother’s witch powers after two thugs (guest stars Brad Tatum and Will Stewart) kidnap him to use his powers for their evil gain.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An earthquake unearths a shadowy evil Woogy who promptly takes over the gasman on the Halliwell premises who promptly takes over Phoebe, who as a child most feared the Woogyman the girls’ grandma always talked about.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A dangerous mortal (guest star Alex McArthur) uses a crystal sword to suck powers out of people and targets Prue (Shannen Doherty) as his next victim. To help combat him, Prue casts a spell to strengthen her powers, only it ends up cloning her twice.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After a run in with a demon who’s responsible for the death of the sisters’ mother, Prue, Piper and Phoebe are transported back to the 1970’s after casting a spell to try to prevent her death and their loss of powers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help Brendan (guest star Michael Weatherly) who’s two brothers (guest stars David Kriegel and Nick Kokotakis) are evil warlocks that attempt to convert him as well, forming the Evil Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he heads to South Africa to meet a very special, and critically endangered, Southern black Rhino named Munu, who's lost his vision, but found his forever home at Founder's Lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Helpers
programme.desc: Prepare to be amazed by seven true stories of some truly remarkable service animals on today’s Wild Countdown! From K-9 cops to dolphin detectives, we’re counting down seven remarkable animal super stars!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the survival secrets of crafty prey species. Wildebeest, Zebra, Wombats, Poison Dart Frogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for some of his scariest animal encounters with Lions, Crocodiles, Snakes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dangerously Cute
programme.desc: When it comes to wildlife, sometimes danger wears a disguise. Today, Jungle Jack is looking at the dark side of six deceptively darling animals, from the poison dart frog and duck-billed platypus to the hippopotamus. Find out which creature is number one.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into South Africa's Zululand and Hluhluwe-iMfolozi Park – the oldest nature reserve in Africa, where he encounters Baboons, Elephant, Rhino and more, all after witnessing the birth of a baby at the Zulu Nyala Game Reserve.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animals and Traditions
programme.desc: Today, meet Kenya’s Masai cattle herders, Thailand’s mahouts and their elephants, the cowboys down south in South America, plus many more cultured creatures on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: See Jack dive with a bull shark, encounter a highly venomous sea snake and get in a sticky situation with a sea creature. Then Jack takes part in some local traditions and learns of Fiji's ominous past.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Central Florida, Jack assists in the release of eight captive-born Whooping Cranes, considered among the rarest and most endangered birds in the world. Jack also goes up in a helicopter for the annual survey of Florida's Bald Eagle population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: All of the creatures on today’s countdown are livin’ large! Join Jungle Jack as he counts downs the biggest land animals on the planet – hippos, rhinos, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they explore Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest encountering wild Chimpanzees, and Colobus Monkeys. They also get lessons from the locals on traditional tea picking and modern beekeeping.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Nose Knows
programme.desc: Feeling nosey? Today’s Countdown has got you covered with some of the most notorious noses in the animal kingdom. Seven remarkable stories of creatures that use their noses to flirt, fight and even shower!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Join him as he visits some of his favorite aquariums and zoological parks, which are on a mission to help save wildlife. Meet sun bears, moose, sea lion pups, a baby rhino, and other wild animals that are all part of new zoo and aquarium programs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he searches for the greatest ape species, like Gorillas, Orangutans, Chimpanzees, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores the red island known as Rabida in Ecuador's Galapagos Islands. See Darwin Finches, Sea Lions, Pelicans and loads of other creatures living on the enchanting island!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing Red
programme.desc: Jungle Jack Hanna is seeing red in this exclusive Wild Countdown! Discover why this color is so important to the survival of these animals in their natural habitats and find out who comes out on top!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Rest Stops
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is on an epic animal road trip, meeting up with amazing creatures at the wildest rest stops on the planet! Sea turtles nesting in West Africa, whale sharks feeding in Belize, birds wading in Canada and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack kicks things off in western Canada where he learns the horse riding ropes from a genuine cowboy, then he heads to Florida to visit a very different kind of retirement home, all before seeing an incredible horse whisperer at work in California.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Seeing is Believing
programme.desc: Today, you’ll see six stories about extraordinary creatures with incredible senses. Some can see their victims from miles away, others navigate in complete darkness, and some even find their victims just by sensing body heat!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in Kenya as he tracks a trio of hunting cheetahs, braves a pack of scavenging jackals, and then with his wife Sue meets an extremely endangered and undeniably cute baby black rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is counting down his most unbelievable big fish stories from beneath the waves!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Ecuador's diverse landscapes are home to loads of unique creatures. Visit the Mashpi cloud forests, home to hummingbirds and bushmasters; witness birds of prey in flight near Otavalo's colorful markets; and the Quito Zoo welcomes a baby jaguar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as meets the thick-skinned members of the pachyderm family. Rhinos, Elephants, Hippos, Tapirs, and Warthogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack enters the Mouth of Bull, in Panama's Bocas del Toro! Poison Dart Frogs, Snakes, Jellyfish, Sloths and so much more on this adventure to Panama's Caribbean Coast!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a step back into the past, and get a unique behind the scenes tour of the famous Hearst Castle in California. Stephen Hearst, the great grandson of William Randolph Hearst gives Jack the grand tour of the family ranch.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an epic adventure into South Africa's Zululand. All that before meeting the notorious Zulu warriors.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.desc: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the devil to ensure the success of his newspaper.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
